name: Easy Homestyle Macaroni & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 cups Hot water (use 1 1/2 cups for Velveeta Shells & Cheese)
1/2 cup Sour cream (use 1/3 cup for Velveeta Shells & Cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix water and mustard in a 1-quart casserole dish.
3. Whisk in the Cheese Sauce from the Pouch.
4. Stir in dry Pasta; cover with a tight-fitting lid.
5. Bake for 30 minutes.
6. Uncover; stir in sour cream.
7. Continue baking, uncovered, for 10 more minutes.
8. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
Makes 6 servings.
STIR-IN IDEAS:
Reduce water to 2 cups (reduce to 1 1/4 cups for Velveeta Shells & Cheese).
Add 1 cup chopped cooked broccoli and 1 cup chopped ham, or
1 cup cooked peas and 1 cup chopped cooked chicken when stirring in sour cream.
Continue as directed above.
VARIATIONS:
Top with combined 1/2 crushed crackers and 1 tablespoon melted margarine after stirring in sour cream. Continue as directed above.
Substitute low-fat or non-fat sour cream for regular sour cream.
